```dashboard

    { "title": "Total Files", "value": 1245 },
    { "title": "Avg Per Day", "value": 14.2 },
    { "title": "Active Employees", "value": 12 }
  ]
}
```

### CSV Export of Employee Data
The full employee data will be extracted into a CSV file. Below is the structure of the data that will be included:

- **Employee Name**
- **Total Files Handled**
- **Manual Files**
- **Automatic Files**
- **Total Modifications**
- **Avg Files Per Day**
- **Days Active**
- **Most Productive Day**
- **Manual vs Auto Ratio**

Here's the CSV export command:

```export

  "title": "Employee Data Extract",
  "description": "Download employee performance data as a CSV file",
  "filename": "employee_performance_data.csv",
  "data": [
    { "Name": "MAROUANE.ESSADKAOUI", "Total Files": 2123, "Manual Files": 58, "Automatic Files": 2065, "Total Modifications": 6400, "Avg Files Per Day": 111.74, "Days Active": 19, "Most Productive Day": "2026-02-11", "Manual vs Auto": "2.73% manual / 97.27% automatic" },

    { "Name": "CHAIMAAE.EJJARI", "Total Files": 1647, "Manual Files": 1596, "Automatic Files": 51, "Total Modifications": 10079, "Avg Files Per Day": 41.17, "Days Active": 40, "Most Productive Day": "2026-02-27", "Manual vs Auto": "96.9% manual / 3.1% automatic" }

}
```
